requirements_met: Pure functions with zero I/O dependencies
validation_results.test_output_summary: 16 passed in 0.02s - comprehensive coverage of UUIDv5 determinism, namespace reuse, identity uniqueness, version-invariant hashing, content sensitivity, and purity constraints
validation_results.code_quality: Excellent - pure functions with comprehensive test coverage for all edge cases and constraints
edge_cases_covered: Same natural key across multiple calls (determinism)
Identity uniqueness for all three segments (project/identifier/payload_type)
Version changes do not affect content hash
Domain tags and supersedes list affect hash

criteria_verification.notes: Independent tests confirm record_identity returns UUIDv5 and produces byte-identical results for the same natural key across multiple calls (test_returns_uuid5, test_same_key_yields_identical_uuid both PASSED)

Independent test confirms single module-level FLEET_MEMORY_NAMESPACE constant is used by all calls, verified by comparing output with manual uuid.uuid5(FLEET_MEMORY_NAMESPACE, key) computation (test_uses_single_namespace_constant PASSED)

Independent tests verify identity uniqueness across all three segments: same segments yield same identity, different project/identifier/payload_type each yield different identities (4 tests PASSED covering all combinations)
Independent test confirms content_hash produces identical hashes for payloads with identical semantic content but different version numbers (test_version_change_does_not_affect_hash PASSED)

Independent tests confirm hash sensitivity to all semantic content changes including single-character changes, domain_tags, supersedes list, and general content differences (4 tests PASSED covering all sensitivity scenarios)

Independent tests confirm purity: no forbidden imports (httpx, Settings, Store, openai, anthropic), deterministic behavior across 10 repeated calls for both functions (3 tests PASSED: test_no_io_imports, test_record_identity_is_pure, test_content_hash_is_pure)
Quality gates all passed, Player reported successful ruff check and ruff format --check with zero errors for all modified files in src/fleet_memory/writer/

rationale: All 7 acceptance criteria verified through independent test execution (16 tests, 100% pass rate), honesty verification (score 1.0), and quality gate validation. The implementation provides pure, deterministic helper functions with comprehensive test coverage for all specified edge cases and constraints.
